prose: The Fukui reactivity calculation on benzaldehyde using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase has been completed. The most electrophilic center is atom 3 (symbol: C) with F+ = 0.39938966. The method used was DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The calculation encountered warnings related to convergence of the N+1 and N−1 states, which is noted for interpretation. The result is fully documented and provenance is as specified.
